label: Offline AI fills for remaining ASC/MC angle aspects (Ops S3)

records.title: Ascendant Opposition Midheaven
records.summary: A opposition between Ascendant and Midheaven places approach and public direction in a negotiation relationship. Mirrors across an axis of personal approach (how one meets the world) with visible aim, this Midpoint lens is a symbolic study of how presence and public direction meet—not a fixed personality verdict or a forecast of events. Read it as a reflective pairing of images rather than a fate claim.
records.growth: Practice distinguishing approach from public direction without forcing them into a single story. Notice when negotiation becomes automatic, and choose when to lean into the contact and when to leave space. Growth is in conscious proportion—not in predicting outcomes.

records.title: Ascendant Trine Midheaven
records.summary: A trine between Ascendant and Midheaven places approach and public direction in a reinforcement relationship. Read it as a reflective pairing of images rather than a fate claim.
records.growth: Practice distinguishing approach from public direction without forcing them into a single story. Notice when reinforcement becomes automatic, and choose when to lean into the contact and when to leave space. Growth is in conscious proportion—not in predicting outcomes.
